metadata.source: Iteration 2 — applied retro findings + user feedback on line-crossings and bus-pattern convergence. Added 3 new assertions per eval (max waypoints, convergence alignment, frame non-overlap). Skipped baseline runs per updated iterate-skill-eval hard rule #9.

expectations.text: File is well-formed XML with mxfile > diagram > mxGraphModel > root structure
expectations.evidence: mxfile > diagram > mxGraphModel > root skeleton present

expectations.text: Root contains both mxCell id='0' and mxCell id='1' parent='0' (required draw.io skeleton)
expectations.evidence: cells 0 and 1 present with id=1 parent=0

expectations.text: Every mxCell with vertex='1' has a child mxGeometry element
Every mxCell with edge='1' has a child mxGeometry with relative='1'
All IDs are unique across the document
Every edge's source and target reference an existing mxCell id in the document
expectations.evidence: all 13 edges have valid source+target refs

expectations.text: Exactly one swimlane frame (style contains 'swimlane') — this is a single-subsystem diagram
At least 12 content boxes (vertex cells that are not the frame and not legend swatches)
All content boxes use rounded=1 and arcSize=15 (hand-friendly rounded corners, not sharp)
expectations.evidence: all 12 content boxes use rounded=1 (arcSize=15 where set)

expectations.text: All boxes use fontStyle=0 or omit fontStyle entirely — never fontStyle=2 (italic text on boxes is a style regression)
expectations.evidence: all boxes have fontStyle=0 or omitted

expectations.text: Every color-coded box with strokeColor matching one of the 4 semantic colors (#1e1e1e, #1971c2, #e03131, #f08c00) has a matching fontColor in its style string — stroke and font must agree
expectations.evidence: all 16 color-coded boxes have stroke=font (or no semantic stroke)

expectations.text: All 4 semantic colors (#1e1e1e, #1971c2, #e03131, #f08c00) appear as strokeColor on at least one cell — the full palette is used
At least 4 legend swatches exist: boxes sized 80-120 wide and 20-40 tall, one per semantic color, inside the frame (parent = frame id)
At least one edge uses dashed=1 (the retry/feedback flows must be visually dashed)

At least one pair of edges uses same-side exit/entry — both endpoints at exitX=0;entryX=0 OR both at exitX=1;entryX=1 (the feedback-loop mechanic; opposite-side loops route around the whole frame and look wrong)
At least 2 edge-label cells exist: connectable='0', parent is an edge id (not the frame or '1'), style contains 'edgeLabel'
expectations.evidence: 2 edge-label cells correctly parented to edges

expectations.text: All edges use edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle (no curved/straight edges — diagrams are orthogonal by default)
No edge has more than 3 waypoints in its <Array as='points'> (aspiration: max 2 turns — 3 is allowed only for edges targeting frames, which need one extra routing bend)
expectations.evidence: all 13 edges have ≤3 waypoints — routing is layout-driven, not hand-waypointed

expectations.text: When 3+ non-feedback edges share a target, all of them enter from the same side of the target — same entryX OR same entryY (the bus/convergence pattern, not octopus fan-in; same-side feedback loops are exempt)
PNG export file exists at the expected path and is >10 KB (rendered something non-trivial)
File is well-formed XML with mxfile > diagram > mxGraphModel > root structure
expectations.evidence: mxfile > diagram > mxGraphModel > root skeleton present

expectations.text: Root contains both mxCell id='0' and mxCell id='1' parent='0'
expectations.evidence: cells 0 and 1 present with id=1 parent=0

expectations.text: Every vertex cell has a child mxGeometry; every edge cell has a child mxGeometry with relative='1'
All IDs are unique across the document
Every edge's source and target reference an existing mxCell id
expectations.evidence: all 18 edges have valid source+target refs

expectations.text: Exactly 3 swimlane frames — one per container (Sensor Array, Cognition Core, Actuator Mesh)
At least 18 content boxes (vertex cells that are not frames and not legend swatches)
All content boxes use rounded=1 and arcSize=15
expectations.evidence: all 19 content boxes use rounded=1 (arcSize=15 where set)

expectations.text: All boxes have fontStyle=0 or omit fontStyle (no italic box text)
expectations.evidence: all boxes have fontStyle=0 or omitted

expectations.text: Every color-coded box with a semantic strokeColor has a matching fontColor in its style (strokeColor = fontColor)
expectations.evidence: all 23 color-coded boxes have stroke=font (or no semantic stroke)

expectations.text: All 4 semantic colors (#1e1e1e, #1971c2, #e03131, #f08c00) appear as strokeColor somewhere — full palette used

At least 3 cross-frame edges exist: edges whose source-cell parent differs from target-cell parent AND whose own parent is '1' (cross-frame edges live at top level, not inside any frame — this is the most-missed mechanic)
At least 2 internal edges exist where edge.parent equals both endpoints' parent (a frame id) — internal edges are inside the frame
expectations.evidence: 9 internal edges with parent matching endpoints

expectations.text: At least 2 cells have dashed=1 in their style (optional/noteworthy markers — Vibration sensor, Fail-safe, LED/Audio Feedback, fallback edge)
Legend exists: 4 swatches (80-120 wide, 20-40 tall), one per semantic color — placement either inside a frame OR at top-level is acceptable for multi-container diagrams
At least one feedback-loop edge with same-side exit/entry (exitX=entryX=0 OR exitX=entryX=1) — the Fail-safe Fallback loop
All edges use edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle
No edge has more than 3 waypoints in its <Array as='points'> (aspiration: max 2 turns — 3 is allowed only for edges targeting frames)
expectations.evidence: all 18 edges have ≤3 waypoints — routing is layout-driven, not hand-waypointed

expectations.text: When 3+ non-feedback edges share a target, all of them enter from the same side of the target — same entryX OR same entryY (the 5 sensor fan-in into Signal Fusion must use this bus pattern; same-side feedback loops are exempt)
Frames do not overlap: all 3 swimlane frames have non-overlapping bounding boxes (> 5px overlap fails)
expectations.evidence: all 3 frames have non-overlapping bounding boxes

expectations.text: PNG export file exists at the expected path and is >10 KB
